target_market_label.zh: 哈萨克斯坦（EAEU TR / KEGOC / MID）
target_market_label.zht: 哈薩克斯坦（EAEU TR / KEGOC / MID）

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入哈薩克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Kazakhstan EAEU electrical safety and EMC, KazStandard / GOST / IEC evidence, KEGOC grid-connection, RES auction, and 50 Hz expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与哈萨克斯坦EAEU电气安全及EMC、KazStandard/GOST/IEC证据、KEGOC并网、可再生能源竞价和50Hz要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與哈薩克斯坦EAEU電氣安全及EMC、KazStandard/GOST/IEC證據、KEGOC併網、可再生能源競價和50Hz要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAEU TR scope determination, KEGOC grid-connection approval, RES auction qualification decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Kazakhstan, EAEU, KEGOC, KazStandard, Ministry of Energy, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, tender submission, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAEU TR适用范围裁定、KEGOC并网批准、可再生能源竞价资格结论、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货、投标或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行哈萨克斯坦、EAEU、KEGOC、KazStandard、能源部、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAEU TR適用範圍裁定、KEGOC併網批准、可再生能源競價資格結論、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨、投標或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哈薩克斯坦、EAEU、KEGOC、KazStandard、能源部、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Kazakhstan, the main baseline is EAEU conformity for applicable low-voltage equipment and EMC requirements, usually under TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 with EAC marking where the product is in scope. Project delivery then depends on IEC 62109 / ST RK / GOST evidence, KEGOC or local network grid-connection review, 50 Hz settings, and renewable-energy auction or PPA documentation where the inverter is part of a utility-scale RES project.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口哈萨克斯坦时，基础要求通常是适用低压设备和EMC要求下的EAEU符合性，产品落入范围时通常涉及TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及EAC标志。项目交付还取决于IEC 62109/ST RK/GOST证据、KEGOC或当地电网并网审查、50Hz设置，以及逆变器作为公用事业级可再生能源项目组成部分时的竞价或购电协议文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口哈薩克斯坦時，基礎要求通常是適用低壓設備和EMC要求下的EAEU符合性，產品落入範圍時通常涉及TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及EAC標誌。項目交付還取決於IEC 62109/ST RK/GOST證據、KEGOC或當地電網併網審查、50Hz設定，以及逆變器作為公用事業級可再生能源項目組成部分時的競價或購電協議文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, renewable-energy settlement center, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
